---
name: capillary:api-coverage
description: Static-analysis API test coverage report for Capillary test suites. Detects every endpoint exposed by a Capillary SUT (LoopBack 4 controllers), matches it against the calls made by the test repo through its companion library (Managers/manager method/config-endpoints pattern), and produces a consistent JSON + HTML coverage report. The bundled ts-morph tool is the single source of truth — every Capillary suite reports in the same shape so one QA dashboard pattern works for all of them.
---

Type: flexible

<objective>
Static-analysis API test coverage report for Capillary test suites. Detects every endpoint exposed by a Capillary SUT (LoopBack 4 controllers), matches it against the calls made by the test repo through its companion library (Managers/manager method/config-endpoints pattern), and produces a consistent JSON + HTML coverage report. The bundled ts-morph tool is the single source of truth — every Capillary suite reports in the same shape so one QA dashboard pattern works for all of them.

Phases:

- detect: Confirm this is a Capillary test repo (Playwright + library companion)
- bootstrap: First-run-only — `npm install && npm run build` inside the bundled tool
- locate: Resolve SUT, library, and skip set from `.harness/coverage.config.json` or fall back to heuristics
- classify: Apply the resolved skip set; surface b2b heuristic suggestions if none provided (optional)
- run: Invoke the bundled tool with detected paths and skip flags
- report: Open coverage.html, surface headline numbers, flag 0% domains
  </objective>
